forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Open the link to activate your account.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Verification email resent. Check your inbox.

callback.notConfiguredDescription: Add your real Supabase URL and key before testing sign-in.
callback.missingDataDescription: Open this screen from an email or OAuth sign-in redirect rather than navigating to it directly.
callback.timeout: Authentication took too long. Please try opening the link again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordLetter: Password must contain at least one letter.
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
validation.passwordRequirementsHint: At least 8 characters, including a letter and a number.
